query: SELECT customerName, locationPriorityPatterns, locationExclusionPatterns, notes FROM customer_rules WHERE customerName LIKE '%Amercare%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4NCq8mAsshAuKGA.2865343ca485 --database K5ogkLhSXtccCnqH4Vm3fs --execute SELECT customerName, locationPriorityPatterns, locationExclusionPatterns, notes FROM customer_rules WHERE customerName LIKE '%Amercare%';

rows.notes: Calgary warehouse: exclude Building 1 locations (10#### and 11####). Use pure FEFO (oldest receiveItemId first) within all other locations.

stdout:
customerName	locationPriorityPatterns	locationExclusionPatterns	notes
Amercare	[]	[{"label": "Building 1 (exclude)", "pattern": "^1[01]"}]	Calgary warehouse: exclude Building 1 locations (10#### and 11####). Use pure FEFO (oldest receiveItemId first) within all other locations.
